title: ÜSSAM (Strategic Studies Application and Research Center) Announcements
content:
ÜSSAM (Strategic Studies Application and Research Center) Announcements

The 4th International Media and Society Symposium, entitled "The Future of Media", will be organised by Istinye University. The workshop, which will continue for two days on 6-7 May, will be attended by Uskudar University ÜSSAM Digital Strategy Desk consultant Assoc. Prof. Dr. Feride Zeynep Güder and students from Istinye University and the Faculty of Communication at Uskudar University. The workshop will be conducted online, and all interested parties are invited to attend.

Meeting ID: 914 0862 2483

In view of the considerable number of applications received for the internship programme scheduled to take place between April and July 2024, we are now accepting applications for the period extending from May to August 2024. Candidates who wish to be considered for an internship commencing in May 2024 are required to submit their application forms by 29 April 2024 at the latest.
